evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: help us move faster, make better decisions, and maintain trust with schools and learners; ship meaningful improvements every month
evidence.domain_risk: Become our day-to-day lead for data privacy and school-facing data assurance - supporting data sharing agreements and DPIAs, and ensuring our practices around children's data are robust and consistently applied
evidence.data_team_maturity: keep our warehouse/dbt/Lightdash stack reliable and scalable - without slowing the business down
evidence.jd_authorship: Embed 'instrumentation before shipping' so every major release launches with the right KPIs, tracking, dashboards, and alerts - enabling fast learning, quick diagnosis, and confident iteration
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Strengthen use of measurement in product processes: Embed 'instrumentation before shipping' so every major release launches with the right KPIs, tracking, dashboards, and alerts - enabling fast learning, quick diagnosis, and confident iteration
evidence.autonomy_level: set data strategy and own Data team OKRs
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Put in place pragmatic governance and monitoring for AI features that touch learner responses and scoring; keep our warehouse/dbt/Lightdash stack reliable and scalable

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: help us move faster, make better decisions, and maintain trust with schools and learners; ship meaningful improvements every month
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple velocity signals ('move faster', 'ship meaningful improvements every month', 'ships quickly') paired with substantial rigour signals ('data governance', 'privacy-by-design', 'DPIAs', 'robust', 'responsible AI').
domain_risk_quote: Become our day-to-day lead for data privacy and school-facing data assurance - supporting data sharing agreements and DPIAs, and ensuring our practices around children's data are robust and consistently applied
domain_risk_reasoning: Education sector involves sensitive children's data and explicit GDPR/compliance requirements (DPIAs) but lacks financial reporting or banking-grade regulatory consequences.
data_team_maturity_quote: keep our warehouse/dbt/Lightdash stack reliable and scalable - without slowing the business down
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Named tools and infrastructure (warehouse, dbt, Lightdash) exist and responsibilities emphasize scaling/improving rather than building from zero.
jd_authorship_quote: Embed 'instrumentation before shipping' so every major release launches with the right KPIs, tracking, dashboards, and alerts - enabling fast learning, quick diagnosis, and confident iteration
jd_authorship_reasoning: Technically specific with named tools (dbt, Lightdash), precise methodologies (instrumentation before shipping, impact evaluation design), and company context (A-Levels, GCSEs, learner scoring).
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Strengthen use of measurement in product processes: Embed 'instrumentation before shipping' so every major release launches with the right KPIs, tracking, dashboards, and alerts - enabling fast learning, quick diagnosis, and confident iteration
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Product analytics and measurement in product development is the first responsibility in the 12-month plan, with explicit emphasis on KPIs, feature impact measurement, and embedding measurement into product processes.
autonomy_level_quote: set data strategy and own Data team OKRs
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role explicitly owns strategy definition and OKRs for the data function, not execution of someone else's plan, positioning this as a leadership role that shapes direction.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Put in place pragmatic governance and monitoring for AI features that touch learner responses and scoring; keep our warehouse/dbt/Lightdash stack reliable and scalable
ai_role_quote: Put in place pragmatic governance and monitoring for AI features that touch learner responses and scoring
ai_role_reasoning: Candidate builds governance and monitoring infrastructure that AI systems depend on to operate safely.
testing_framing_quote: Become our day-to-day lead for data privacy and school-facing data assurance
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns data quality and assurance practices with direct leadership responsibility.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: supporting data sharing agreements and DPIAs, and ensuring our practices around children's data are robust and consistently applied
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Candidate operates in highly regulated domain with children's data requiring compliance frameworks (DPIAs, data agreements).
